title: HealthCrosshair
description: A lightweight, modern PvP health indicator that displays your health directly below the crosshair with a sleek 70% opacity and customizable display modes.
body:
Health Crosshair
A sleek, minimalist PvP health indicator for Fabric.

Health Crosshair is a lightweight, client-side mod designed to keep your focus where it belongs—on your crosshair. It renders your current health directly in your line of sight with a modern, high-transparency aesthetic, making it perfect for competitive PvP and survival.

✨ Features
Modern HUD Design: A compact and clean layout that places essential health information right at your crosshair for faster reaction times.

Smart Transparency: The HUD features a balanced opacity, ensuring it remains fully readable against any block or entity without obstructing your view.

Dual Display Modes:

20 HP Mode: Shows your health in raw points (Standard 1–20 scale).

10 Hearts Mode: Shows your health in hearts (Standard 1–10 scale).

In-Game Customization: Press 'H' (default) to open the settings menu. Toggle the mod or switch display modes instantly without leaving your world.

Auto-Save Config: Your preferences are saved automatically, so your setup is ready to go every time you launch the game.

🛠 Technical Details
Environment: Client-side only.

Performance: Extremely lightweight with zero impact on FPS.

Compatibility: Works on any server and is compatible with most other HUD mods.

📜 Credits
Developed by Zayb.
